---
title: "Spring 2026 Project"
author: Theresa Louise Binnings
format: html
execute: 
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
embed-resources: true
---


```{r}
#| label: load-packages
#| include: false

library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(paletteer)

```

## Data Description

*Here is a description of my data and a link to the source embded here with references.*

## Data Cleaning

*Here I describe in plain speak what I did to clean the data. Do not show code or use technical terms. I want to be able to read this and understand what I did.*



```{r}
#| label: read-in-and-clean-data
#single code chuck data

tbl2019_stemfields_clean <- read_excel("data-raw/nsf22310-tab001-005.xlsx", 
                                 skip = 15, 
                                 col_names = c("field", 
                                               "total", 
                                               "hisp_lat", 
                                               "amer_ind_alaskan", 
                                               "asian", 
                                               "black_afri_amer", 
                                               "nat_hawaii_pacific_islander", 
                                               "white", 
                                               "multi_race", 
                                               "a", "b", "c", "d", "e", "f", "g"),
                                 na = c("D", "N", "*", "S")) |>
  select("field", "total", "hisp_lat", "amer_ind_alaskan", "asian", "black_afri_amer", "nat_hawaii_pacific_islander", "white", "multi_race") |>
  pivot_longer(!c(field, total), 
               names_to = "ethnicity_race", 
               values_to = "count") |>
  select(!total) |>
  slice(-c(57:63)) |>
  mutate(sex = case_when(
    row_number() <= 56 ~ "female",
    row_number() > 56 & row_number() <= 112 ~ "male")) |>
  filter(field != "S&E fields") |>
    mutate(ethnicity_race = case_when(
        ethnicity_race == "hisp_lat" ~ "Hispanic or Latino",
        ethnicity_race == "amer_ind_alaskan" ~ "Other", 
        ethnicity_race == "asian" ~ "Asian",
        ethnicity_race == "black_afri_amer" ~ "Black or African American",
        ethnicity_race == "nat_hawaii_pacific_islander" ~ "Other",
        ethnicity_race == "white" ~ "White", 
        ethnicity_race == "multi_race" ~ "Other")) |>  
  mutate(SE_type = case_when(
    field == "S&E-related fields" ~ "SE_related_fields",
    field == "Non-S&E fields" ~ "non_SE_fields",
    .default = "SE_field"))

```


```{r}
#| label: write-clean-2019-data-to-folder

write_csv(tbl2019_stemfields_clean, file = "data-clean/tbl2019_stemfields_clean.csv")
```

```{r}
#| label: single-code-chunk-clean-data-2023


tbl2023_stemfields_clean <- read_excel("data-raw/nsf25322-tab001-005.xlsx", 
                                 skip = 15, 
                                 col_names = c("field", 
                                               "total", 
                                               "hisp_lat", 
                                               "amer_ind_alaskan", 
                                               "asian", 
                                               "black_afri_amer", 
                                               "nat_hawaii_pacific_islander", 
                                               "white", 
                                               "multi_race", 
                                               "a", "b", "c", "d", "e", "f", "g"),
                                 na = c("D", "N", "*", "S")) |>
  select("field", "total", "hisp_lat", "amer_ind_alaskan", "asian", "black_afri_amer", "nat_hawaii_pacific_islander", "white", "multi_race") |>
  pivot_longer(!c(field, total), 
               names_to = "ethnicity_race", 
               values_to = "count") |>
  select(!total) |>
  slice(-c(57:63)) |>
  mutate(sex = case_when(
    row_number() <= 56 ~ "female",
    row_number() > 56 & row_number() <= 112 ~ "male")) |>
  filter(field != "S&E fields") |>
  mutate(ethnicity_race = case_when(
    ethnicity_race == "hisp_lat" ~ "Hispanic or Latino",
    ethnicity_race == "amer_ind_alaskan" ~ "Other", 
    ethnicity_race == "asian" ~ "Asian",
    ethnicity_race == "black_afri_amer" ~ "Black or African American",
    ethnicity_race == "nat_hawaii_pacific_islander" ~ "Other",
    ethnicity_race == "white" ~ "White", 
    ethnicity_race == "multi_race" ~ "Other")) |>  
  mutate(SE_type = case_when(
    field == "S&E-related fields" ~ "SE_related_fields",
    field == "Non-S&E fields" ~ "non_SE_fields",
    .default = "SE_field"))

```


```{r}
#| label: write-clean-2023-data-to-folder

write_csv(tbl2023_stemfields_clean, file = "data-clean/tbl2023_stemfields_clean.csv")
```



```{r}
#| label: ggplot
#https://r-graph-gallery.com/297-circular-barplot-with-groups.html 

ggplot(tbl2019_stemfields_clean, aes(x=field, y=count, fill=field)) + 
  geom_col() +
  coord_polar() +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_fill_viridis_d()

```


```{r}
#| label: read-in-2019-degree-types-data

tbl2019_degreetype_raw<- read_excel("data-raw/nsf22310-tab002-001.xlsx",
                                    skip = 15,
                                    col_names = c("field", 
                                               "total", 
                                               "female", 
                                               "male",
                                               "hisp_lat", 
                                               "amer_ind_alaskan", 
                                               "asian", 
                                               "black_afri_amer", 
                                               "nat_hawaii_pacific_islander", 
                                               "white", 
                                               "multi_race", 
                                               "a", "b"),
                                    na = c("D", "S", "*")) |>
  select(c("field", "total", "female", "male", "hisp_lat", "amer_ind_alaskan", "asian", "black_afri_amer", "nat_hawaii_pacific_islander", "white", "multi_race")) 

```

```{r}
#| label: split-degreetypes-data-sex-race

tbl2019_degreetype_sex <- tbl2019_degreetype_raw |>
  select(c("field", "total", "female", "male"))

tbl2019_degreetype_ethnicity <- tbl2019_degreetype_raw |>
  select(c("field", "total", "hisp_lat", "amer_ind_alaskan", "asian", "black_afri_amer", "nat_hawaii_pacific_islander", "white", "multi_race"))

```


```{r}
#| label: clean-sex-2019-degree-types-data

tbl2019_degreetype_sex <- tbl2019_degreetype_sex |>   
  mutate(DegreeLevel = case_when(
    row_number() <= 8 ~ "bachelors",
    row_number() > 9 & row_number() <= 17 ~ "masters",
    row_number() > 18 & row_number() <= 26 ~ "doctorate",
    row_number() > 27 & row_number() <= 35 ~ "professional")) |>
  slice(-c(9,18,27)) |>
  mutate(SE_type = case_when(
    field == "S&E-related fields" ~ "SE_related_fields",
    field == "Non-S&E fields" ~ "non_SE_fields",
    .default = "SE_field")) |>
  select(!total) |>
  pivot_longer(c(female, male), 
               names_to = "sex", 
               values_to = "count")

```

```{r}
#| label: clean-ethnicity-2019-degree-types-data

tbl2019_degreetype_ethnicity <- tbl2019_degreetype_ethnicity |>
  mutate(DegreeLevel = case_when(
    row_number() <= 8 ~ "bachelors",
    row_number() > 9 & row_number() <= 17 ~ "masters",
    row_number() > 18 & row_number() <= 26 ~ "doctorate",
    row_number() > 27 & row_number() <= 35 ~ "professional")) |>
  slice(-c(9,18,27))|>
  mutate(SE_type = case_when(
    field == "S&E-related fields" ~ "SE_related_fields",
    field == "Non-S&E fields" ~ "non_SE_fields",
    .default = "SE_field")) |>
  select(!total) |>
  pivot_longer(!c(field, DegreeLevel, SE_type), 
               names_to = "ethnicity_race", 
               values_to = "count") |>
 mutate(ethnicity_race = case_when(
    ethnicity_race == "hisp_lat" ~ "Hispanic or Latino",
    ethnicity_race == "amer_ind_alaskan" ~ "Other", 
    ethnicity_race == "asian" ~ "Asian",
    ethnicity_race == "black_afri_amer" ~ "Black or African American",
    ethnicity_race == "nat_hawaii_pacific_islander" ~ "Other",
    ethnicity_race == "white" ~ "White", 
    ethnicity_race == "multi_race" ~ "Other"))  

```

```{r}
#| label: write-clean-2019-degree-types-data

write_csv(tbl2019_degreetype_ethnicity, file = "data-clean/tbl2019_degreetype_ethnicity.csv")

write_csv(tbl2019_degreetype_sex, file = "data-clean/tbl2019_degreetype_sex.csv")
```


```{r}
#| label: read-in-2023-degree-types-data

tbl2023_degreetype_raw<- read_excel("data-raw/nsf25322-tab002-001.xlsx",
                                    skip = 15,
                                    col_names = c("field", 
                                               "total", 
                                               "female", 
                                               "male",
                                               "hisp_lat", 
                                               "amer_ind_alaskan", 
                                               "asian", 
                                               "black_afri_amer", 
                                               "nat_hawaii_pacific_islander", 
                                               "white", 
                                               "multi_race", 
                                               "a", "b"),
                                    na = c("D", "S", "*")) |>
  select(c("field", "total", "female", "male", "hisp_lat", "amer_ind_alaskan", "asian", "black_afri_amer", "nat_hawaii_pacific_islander", "white", "multi_race")) 

tbl2023_degreetype_sex <- tbl2023_degreetype_raw |>
  select(c("field", "total", "female", "male"))

tbl2023_degreetype_ethnicity <- tbl2023_degreetype_raw |>
  select(c("field", "total", "hisp_lat", "amer_ind_alaskan", "asian", "black_afri_amer", "nat_hawaii_pacific_islander", "white", "multi_race"))

tbl2023_degreetype_sex <- tbl2023_degreetype_sex |>   
  mutate(DegreeLevel = case_when(
    row_number() <= 8 ~ "bachelors",
    row_number() > 9 & row_number() <= 17 ~ "masters",
    row_number() > 18 & row_number() <= 26 ~ "doctorate",
    row_number() > 27 & row_number() <= 35 ~ "professional")) |>
  slice(-c(9,18,27)) |>
  mutate(SE_type = case_when(
    field == "S&E-related fields" ~ "SE_related_fields",
    field == "Non-S&E fields" ~ "non_SE_fields",
    .default = "SE_field")) |>
  select(!total) |>
  pivot_longer(c(female, male), 
               names_to = "sex", 
               values_to = "count")

tbl2023_degreetype_ethnicity <- tbl2023_degreetype_ethnicity |>
  mutate(DegreeLevel = case_when(
    row_number() <= 8 ~ "bachelors",
    row_number() > 9 & row_number() <= 17 ~ "masters",
    row_number() > 18 & row_number() <= 26 ~ "doctorate",
    row_number() > 27 & row_number() <= 35 ~ "professional")) |>
  slice(-c(9,18,27))|>
  mutate(SE_type = case_when(
    field == "S&E-related fields" ~ "SE_related_fields",
    field == "Non-S&E fields" ~ "non_SE_fields",
    .default = "SE_field")) |>
  select(!total) |>
  pivot_longer(!c(field, DegreeLevel, SE_type), 
               names_to = "ethnicity_race", 
               values_to = "count") |>
  mutate(ethnicity_race = case_when(
    ethnicity_race == "hisp_lat" ~ "Hispanic or Latino",
    ethnicity_race == "amer_ind_alaskan" ~ "Other", 
    ethnicity_race == "asian" ~ "Asian",
    ethnicity_race == "black_afri_amer" ~ "Black or African American",
    ethnicity_race == "nat_hawaii_pacific_islander" ~ "Other",
    ethnicity_race == "white" ~ "White", 
    ethnicity_race == "multi_race" ~ "Other"))   

write_csv(tbl2023_degreetype_ethnicity, file = "data-clean/tbl2023_degreetype_ethnicity.csv")

write_csv(tbl2023_degreetype_sex, file = "data-clean/tbl2023_degreetype_sex.csv")

```

```{r}
#| label: add-ratio-to-stemfieldsclean

tbl2019_stemfields_clean_prop <- tbl2019_stemfields_clean |>
  group_by(field) |>
  mutate(prop_byfield = count/(sum(count, na.rm = TRUE))) |>
  ungroup() |>
  group_by(field, sex) |>
  mutate(prop_bysex = count/(sum(count, na.rm = TRUE))) |>
  ungroup() |>
  mutate(prop = count/(sum(count, na.rm = TRUE)))

```

```{r}
#| label: ggplot-bar-stacked

tbl2019_stemfields_clean_prop |> 
  ggplot(aes(y=prop_byfield, x=fct_relevel(field, c("Biological, agricultural, and environmental life sciences", "Computer and mathematical sciences", "Engineering", "Physical and related scientists", "Social and related sciences", "S&E-related fields", "Non-S&E fields")), fill= fct_relevel(ethnicity_race, c("Other", "Black or African American", "Hispanic or Latino", "Asian", "White")))) +
  geom_col(position = position_stack()) +
  labs(y = "Field",
       x = "Proportions",
       title = "Representation in Science",
       fill = "Ethnicity/Race") +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(end = 0.9) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = unit(rep(-1,4), "cm") 
  ) +
  coord_polar()

```
```{r}
tbl2019_stemfields_clean_prop |> 
  ggplot(aes(y = prop, 
             x = fct_relevel(field, c("Biological, agricultural, and environmental life sciences", 
                                      "Computer and mathematical sciences", 
                                      "Engineering", "Physical and related sciences", 
                                      "Social and related sciences", 
                                      "S&E-related fields", 
                                      "Non-S&E fields")), 
             fill= fct_relevel(ethnicity_race, c("White", 
                                                 "Asian",
                                                 "Hispanic or Latino",
                                                 "Black or African American", 
                                                 "Other")))) +
  geom_col(position = position_stack()) +
  labs(y = "Field",
       x = "Proportions",
       title = "Representation in Science",
       fill = "ethnicity/Race") +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(direction = -1, end = 0.97) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = unit(rep(-1,4), "cm") 
  ) + 
  coord_polar() +
  ylim(-0.02, 0.3) 

```

```{r}
tbl2019_stemfields_clean_prop |> 
  ggplot(aes(y=prop, 
             x=fct_relevel(field, c("Biological, agricultural, and environmental life sciences", 
                                            "Computer and mathematical sciences", 
                                            "Engineering", 
                                            "Physical and related scientists", 
                                            "Social and related sciences", 
                                            "S&E-related fields", 
                                            "Non-S&E fields")), 
             fill= sex)) +
  geom_col(position = position_stack()) +
  labs(y = "Field",
       x = "Proportions",
       title = "Representation in Science",
       fill = "ethnicity/Race") +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(end = 0.3) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = unit(rep(-1,4), "cm") 
  ) + 
  coord_polar()
```


```{r}

tbl2019_stemfields_clean_prop |> 
  distinct(field)

tbl2019_stemfields_clean_prop |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = prop_bysex, y = fct_relevel(field, c("Biological, agricultural, and environmental life sciences",
                                                  "Computer and mathematical sciences", 
                                                  "Engineering", 
                                                  "Physical and related sciences", 
                                                  "Social and related sciences", 
                                                  "S&E-related fields", 
                                                  "Non-S&E fields")), 
             fill= fct_relevel(ethnicity_race, c("Other", 
                                                 "Black or African American", 
                                                 "Hispanic or Latino", 
                                                 "Asian", 
                                                 "White")))) +
  geom_col(position = position_stack()) +
  labs(y = "Field",
       x = "Proportions",
       title = "Representation in Science",
       fill = "ethnicity/Race") +
  theme_minimal() + 
  facet_wrap(~sex) +
  theme(axis.ticks.x = element_blank()) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(end = 0.9)
  
  
```
